articles.title_en: AKORT: foreign retail chains in the Russian Federation continue to invest in their development
articles.lead_en: Companies are opening new stores, investing in regions and new formats, noted Stanislav Bogdanov, Chairman of the Association of Omnichannel Retail Companies

articles.title_en: State Council: issues of investment in the Russian energy sector cannot be resolved only through tariffs
articles.lead_en: Chairman of the commission in the direction of "Energy" Aisen Nikolaev called the volume of investments required for the modernization of existing capacities and the construction of new generation facilities significant

articles.title_en: Rosstat named the areas where Russians on average earn over 200 thousand rubles
articles.lead_en: We are talking about the field of oil and gas production, the field of information and communications, the production of tobacco products, the air and space transport industry, as well as the financial and insurance sectors.
